mapper.insert:
SELECT SMS_SEQ.NEXTVAL AS mseq ,NVL(#{requestTime}, TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') ) AS requestTime FROM DUAL
/* SmsMgmtMapper.insertMsgQueue */ INSERT INTO MSG_QUEUE ( MSEQ /* Sequence */ ,MSG_TYPE /* 1:SMS 2:SMS URL 3:MMS 4:MMS URL */ ,DSTADDR /* 수신자 번호 */ ,CALLBACK /* 발신자 번호 */ ,SUBJECT /* 제목 */ ,TEXT /* 전송메시지 */ ,EXPIRETIME /* 유효시간 */ ,REQUEST_TIME /* 발송요청시간 */ ,OPT_ID /* SMS TEMPLATE ID */ ) SELECT #{mseq} ,MSG_TYPE ,#{mobileNo} ,CALLBACK ,NVL( #{subject}, SUBJECT ) ,NVL( #{sendMessage}, TEXT ) ,EXPIRE_HOUR * 60 * 60 ,TO_DATE(#{requestTime}, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') ,#{templateId} FROM MSP_SMS_TEMPLATE_MST WHERE TEMPLATE_ID = #{templateId}
